name: @beamhop/shell-server
description: Expose a local PTY to browsers over WebSocket and/or P2P (WebRTC).

scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --format esm --sourcemap --external 'node-pty' --external 'ws' --external '@trystero-p2p/*' --external '@beamhop/shell-protocol' && bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --format cjs --sourcemap --entry-naming '[dir]/[name].cjs' --external 'node-pty' --external 'ws' --external '@trystero-p2p/*' --external '@beamhop/shell-protocol' && bun build ./src/cli.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --format esm --sourcemap --banner '#!/usr/bin/env node' --external 'node-pty' --external 'ws' --external '@trystero-p2p/*' --external '@beamhop/shell-protocol' && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly && chmod +x ./dist/cli.js
